rationale: The pair appears potentially substantive: the citing paper explicitly positions itself as extending prior path-to-purchase models that used nontext touchpoint patterns, and the cited paper is exactly a multistage path-to-purchase model of channel visits and purchases. Both notes describe highly overlapping context (online hospitality multichannel journeys) and modeling structure (individual-level probabilistic/MCMC models of visits and conversion), suggesting a likely foundational or comparison role rather than a generic mention.
